_comment: Sample SharePoint item payload that triggers the Approval flow. Use as test input when manually triggering or designing test cases.
Title: Stationery procurement — Q2 office supplies
Justification: Quarterly office supplies for [DEPT-NAME]. Approved budget line code B-247. Three quotations attached. Lowest-evaluated bidder selected per PPRA Rule 21. Items include printer paper, toner cartridges, files, stationery basics.

_expected_flow_behaviour.step_1: Manager approval (any amount) — auto-routed to Department Head
_expected_flow_behaviour.step_2: Amount > 50,000 → Finance Manager approval ALSO required
step_3_approved: Audit list entry with timestamps and approver names
step_3_rejected: Email to Requestor with rejection reason

_test_scenarios: Scenario A: amount 10,000 — only Manager approval triggers
Scenario B: amount 75,000 — both Manager and Finance Manager approvals trigger
Scenario C: Manager rejects — flow stops, requestor notified
Scenario D: Manager approves but Finance rejects — flow stops, requestor notified
Scenario E: amount missing/zero — flow should handle gracefully (default reject or skip)
